text: Mass Spec Query Language (MassQL) is a domain specific language designed to express queries in a mass spectrometry centric fashion.
source_excerpt:
The Mass Spec Query Language (MassQL) is a domain specific language meant to be a succinct way to
express a query in a mass spectrometry centric fashion.

text: MassQL is inspired by SQL but bakes in assumptions of mass spectrometry to make querying more natural for mass spectrometry users.
source_excerpt:
It is inspired by SQL,
but it attempts to bake in assumptions of mass spectrometry to make querying much more
natural for mass spectrometry users.
